headline: Mosaic and Rainbow Rare Earths Advance Uberaba Rare Earths Project in Brazil
summary: TAMPA, FL / ACCESS Newswire / March 11, 2026 / Mosaic Fertilizantes P&K Limitada, a subsidiary of the Mosaic Company ("Mosaic") and Rainbow Rare Earths Limited ("Rainbow") have completed a favorable preliminary economic assessment and entered into ...
